a.xlink:title: Starts the analysis execution.
Builds or configures the data loader for training or evaluation.
Builds or processes event data based on the added event templates and samples.
Splits a string into a vector of substrings based on a delimiter.
Builds graph representations of the event data based on the added graph templates.
Replaces all occurrences of a substring in a string.
Sets up the environment for model inference (prediction).
Creates a directory path, including parent directories if needed.
Builds or calculates metrics for evaluating model performance.
Builds the project structure, possibly setting up directories or initial configurations.
Builds or calculates metrics across different data folds (e.g., for k-fold cross-validation).
Sets up and configures machine learning model sessions for training or inference.
Builds or applies event selections based on the added selection templates.
< Private access specifier for the following members.
Checks if a string ends with a specific substring.
Fetches tags, possibly related to data versions, processing stages, or k-folds.
Converts a relative path to an absolute path.
Ends the current I/O session, closing any open files.
Static helper method to add content (features) to a data map from various sources.
Static method to execute a model (training or inference) on a set of data.
Counts occurrences of a substring in a string.
Static method to execute metric calculation.
Static method to initialize a training loop for an optimizer.
Checks if a path refers to an existing file.
Checks if a string contains a specific substring.
Lists files in a directory, optionally filtered by extension.
